name: Lentils

pros.title: one of the best budget staple foods
pros.explanation: It is unusually cheap, filling, and useful in real meals compared with a lot of healthy-food staples.

pros.title: very filling for the calories
pros.explanation: The fibre and protein combo gives it strong practical fullness.

pros.title: usually affordable and practical
pros.explanation: Makes it easy to use as a real staple rather than a niche health food.

cons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
cons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral uptake somewhat.

cons.title: can be rough on some people digestively
cons.explanation: Not everyone handles legumes equally well.

cons.title: needs some cooking effort
cons.explanation: A small practical friction versus more convenient foods.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate representative placeholders for ruleset tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
